title: The East Bay Regional Park District celebrated its 90th Anniversary on Wednesday, Nov. 13, 2024, at the Regional Parks Botanic Garden with the presentation of resolutions by State

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The East Bay Regional Park District is the largest regional park district in the nation.",
    "The Park District encompasses over 126,000 acres of parklands.",
    "The Park District includes 55 miles of shoreline and over 1,330 miles of trails.",
    "Senator Nancy Skinner secured $36 million in the 2022-23 budget for acquisition and clean-up of Point Molate Regional Park.",
    "Senator Nancy Skinner secured $10 million in the 2021-22 budget to address tree mortality on Park District lands.",
    "Assemblymember Rebecca Bauer-Kahan secured $4 million in the 2019-20 state budget for restoration of Alder and Leatherwood Creek.",
    "The Alder and Leatherwood Creek project restored 3,000 feet of culverted creek to more natural conditions.",
    "The Alder and Leatherwood Creek project is the largest creek restoration project in the Park District's 90-year history.",
    "Assemblymember Bauer-Kahan secured $3.5 million for wildfire protection equipment in the 2021-22 state budget."
  ]
}
```
